perturbation.original_text: 1.88 "Promotion" shall mean (a) those activities customarily undertaken by a Party's field sales representatives in the Territory to encourage the approved use of a particular prescription medical device (or prescription pharmaceutical medicine as applicable) subject to pre-market approval (or other regulatory approval, as applicable), including detailing, and (b) any other activities customarily undertaken by a Party aimed at encouraging the approved use of a particular prescription medical device subject to pre-market authorization approval, including without limitation, healthcare professional peer-to-peer communication, communications of product benefits to IDNs, the creation and use of promotional materials, Marketing, meetings and events (including without limitation speaker bureau events), trade shows, advocacy activities, including with respect to guideline organizations, and sponsorships. The terms "Promote", "Promoting" and "Promotional" shall have corresponding meanings.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.88 "Promotion" shall mean (a) those activities undertaken by Exact's field sales representatives in the Territory to encourage the approved use of a particular prescription medical device (or prescription pharmaceutical medicine as applicable) subject to pre-market approval (or other regulatory approval, as applicable), including detailing, and (b) any other activities undertaken by Exact aimed at encouraging the approved use of a particular prescription medical device subject to pre-market authorization approval, including without limitation, healthcare professional peer-to-peer communication, communications of product benefits to IDNs, the creation and use of promotional materials, Marketing, meetings and events (including without limitation speaker bureau events), trade shows, advocacy activities, including with respect to guideline organizations, and sponsorships. For Pfizer, "Promotion" refers solely to the distribution of approved promotional materials provided by Exact. The terms "Promote", "Promoting" and "Promotional" shall have corresponding meanings.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of 'Promotion' applied equally to both parties, describing activities undertaken to encourage product use. The modified version restricts Pfizer's 'Promotion' activities solely to distributing Exact's promotional materials. This contradicts Section 3.1(a), which outlines Pfizer's right and obligation to 'Promote and Detail the Product' jointly with Exact, implying a more active role than mere distribution. This In-Text contradiction introduces uncertainty about Pfizer's responsibilities and level of involvement in promoting the product.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.1 Appointment. (a) Exclusive Arrangement. Commencing on the Launch Date, Exact and its Affiliates hereby grant to Pfizer and its Affiliates, on an exclusive basis for the Co-Promote Field (except as to Exact and its Affiliates), and Pfizer accepts, the right and obligation to Promote and Detail the Product in the Territory during the Term jointly with Exact, in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, all Applicable Laws and the applicable Annual Marketing Plan. Except as set forth in this Agreement, such right shall be non-transferable and non-sublicensable. In implementing its obligations under this Agreement, Pfizer, without charge or expense to Exact (other than as expressly set forth in Sections 3.6 and 4.2(c) of this Agreement), shall provide facilities, personnel (including management and Sales Representatives) and other resources as Pfizer, in its reasonable discretion but not inconsistent with the express terms of this Agreement, believes necessary. The Parties specifically agree that Exact shall not use the Pfizer name, logo or any Trademarks of Pfizer on any materials, including Promotional Materials, without the express written consent of Pfizer. Notwithstanding this Section 3.1 to the contrary, Exact retains the right to Promote the Product on its own behalf in the Co-Promote Field and, subject to Section 3.1(c), Pfizer shall not Promote or Detail the Product outside the Territory or outside the Co- Promote Field.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the definition of 'Promotion' for Pfizer, restricting it solely to distributing Exact's materials. This directly contradicts section 3.1(a), which grants Pfizer the 'right and obligation to Promote and Detail the Product...jointly with Exact'. The original definition applied equally to both parties. The altered definition limits Pfizer's promotional activities, conflicting with their obligation to 'Promote and Detail', creating a significant in-text contradiction and uncertainty about Pfizer's role and responsibilities.

perturbation.original_text: 1.97 "Sales Representative" shall mean an internal or field sales representative employed by a Party full-time who details products or services for human use in the Territory. For clarity, Sales Representative excludes sales managers such as district business managers and above.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.97 "Sales Representative" shall mean an internal or field sales representative employed by Exact full-time who details products or services for human use in the Territory. For Pfizer, 'Sales Representative' refers only to those individuals distributing materials approved by Exact. For clarity, Sales Representative excludes sales managers such as district business managers and above.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of 'Sales Representative' applied equally to both parties. The modified version restricts the definition of Pfizer's sales representatives, defining them solely as distributors of Exact-approved materials. This creates a contradiction with sections that imply or require Pfizer's sales representatives to engage in activities beyond simple distribution, such as detailing (Section 3.4(a)). This in-text contradiction casts doubts on whether Pfizer's sales force is allowed to do detailing, and raises questions about the intended scope of responsibilities.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.4 Sales Promotion, Detailing Efforts and IDN Promotion. (a) Sales Promotion. Commencing on the Launch Date, each of Exact and Pfizer shall implement the sales Detailing plan set forth in the applicable Annual Marketing Plan and the Sales Deployment Plan. In the case of Pfizer, Pfizer shall ensure that (i) the number of Details in a Calendar Year by Pfizer Sales Representatives is not less than six hundred twenty-five thousand (625,000) Details (for the remainder of 2018 Calendar Year following the Launch Date, Pfizer shall deliver one hundred forty thousand (140,000) Details) and (ii) if the Product is Promoted by Pfizer Sales Representatives (A) in position 2 or higher, the Incentive Compensation weighting directly tied to the Product shall not be less than thirty percent (30%) of Incentive Compensation available to be earned by such Sales Representative in the applicable Calendar Quarter and (B) in position 3 or lower, the Incentive Compensation weighting directly tied to the Product shall not be less than twenty-five percent (25%) of Incentive Compensation available to be earned by such Sales Representative in the applicable Calendar Quarter. If Pfizer delivers less than five hundred sixty-two thousand five hundred (562,500) Details in a Calendar Year, then the Promotion Fee due Pfizer for such Calendar Year shall be reduced by the applicable percentage set forth in the table on Exhibit 3.4(a), with such reduction to be deducted from remittance of the Promotion Fee for the last Calendar Quarter of such Calendar Year; provided that if such deduction exceeds the amount payable for such Calendar Quarter then Exact shall apply any such remaining deduction to the Promotion Fee for the next Calendar Quarter or Calendar Quarters, as necessary until the total deduction has been applied. If Pfizer delivers less than four hundred fifty thousand (450,000) Details in a Calendar Year, in addition to percentage reduction of the Promotion Fee set forth in the table on Exhibit 3.4(a), Exact shall have the right to terminate this Agreement under Section 8.3(b), which termination shall not be subject to the right of Pfizer to cure such breach. In no event shall Pfizer owe any monies to Exact for Detail shortfalls under this Agreement other than to refund the Promotion Fee owed to Exact due to Detail shortfall in accordance with this Section 3.4(a). Each Party shall be responsible for its own Sales Representatives costs attributable to the Product, including base salary and Incentive Compensation, normal travel and entertainment expenses, cost of fleet vehicles and other expenses normally associated with Promotion of products and services similar to the Product.
perturbation.justification: The modified definition of 'Sales Representative' for Pfizer now restricts it to only those distributing Exact-approved materials, while Section 3.4(a) mandates Pfizer Sales Representatives to perform 'Detailing,' implying a broader role beyond simple distribution. This creates a direct contradiction because the changed text limits the scope of activities Pfizer's Sales Representatives can undertake, conflicting with the obligation to conduct 'Detailing' as outlined in Section 3.4(a). The altered definition directly breaks compatibility with the contradicted section, creating an internal inconsistency and rendering the obligations outlined in 3.4(a) unclear or unenforceable. This aligns with the 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction' definition, as the restricted definition effectively omits the detailing function from Pfizer's sales representatives' duties, contradicting the explicit requirement in 3.4(a).

perturbation.original_text: 3.1 Appointment. (a) Exclusive Arrangement. Commencing on the Launch Date, Exact and its Affiliates hereby grant to Pfizer and its Affiliates, on an exclusive basis for the Co-Promote Field (except as to Exact and its Affiliates), and Pfizer accepts, the right and obligation to Promote and Detail the Product in the Territory during the Term jointly with Exact, in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, all Applicable Laws and the applicable Annual Marketing Plan. Except as set forth in this Agreement, such right shall be non-transferable and non-sublicensable. In implementing its obligations under this Agreement, Pfizer, without charge or expense to Exact (other than as expressly set forth in Sections 3.6 and 4.2(c) of this Agreement), shall provide facilities, personnel (including management and Sales Representatives) and other resources as Pfizer, in its reasonable discretion but not inconsistent with the express terms of this Agreement, believes necessary. The Parties specifically agree that Exact shall not use the Pfizer name, logo or any Trademarks of Pfizer on any materials, including Promotional Materials, without the express written consent of Pfizer. Notwithstanding this Section 3.1 to the contrary, Exact retains the right to Promote the Product on its own behalf in the Co-Promote Field and, subject to Section 3.1(c), Pfizer shall not Promote or Detail the Product outside the Territory or outside the Co- Promote Field.
perturbation.changed_text: 3.1 Appointment. (a) Exclusive Arrangement. Commencing on the Launch Date, Exact and its Affiliates hereby grant to Pfizer and its Affiliates, on an exclusive basis for the Co-Promote Field (except as to Exact and its Affiliates), and Pfizer accepts, the right to distribute Product Information to Healthcare providers and Detail the Product in the Territory during the Term jointly with Exact, in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement, all Applicable Laws and the applicable Annual Marketing Plan. Except as set forth in this Agreement, such right shall be non-transferable and non-sublicensable. In implementing its obligations under this Agreement, Pfizer, without charge or expense to Exact (other than as expressly set forth in Sections 3.6 and 4.2(c) of this Agreement), shall provide facilities, personnel (including management and Sales Representatives) and other resources as Pfizer, in its reasonable discretion but not inconsistent with the express terms of this Agreement, believes necessary. The Parties specifically agree that Exact shall not use the Pfizer name, logo or any Trademarks of Pfizer on any materials, including Promotional Materials, without the express written consent of Pfizer. Notwithstanding this Section 3.1 to the contrary, Exact retains the right to Promote the Product on its own behalf in the Co-Promote Field and, subject to Section 3.1(c), Pfizer shall not Promote or Detail the Product outside the Territory or outside the Co- Promote Field.
perturbation.explanation: The original section states that Pfizer has the right and obligation to "Promote and Detail the Product". This modification changes "Promote" to "Distribute Product Information to Healthcare providers". Given that 'Promote' is specifically defined in the contract, by changing this word, it limits the breadth of what Pfizer is supposed to do. It is conflicting to the responsibilities that this section is referencing, giving Pfizer an obligation but limiting their ability to act to fulfil that obligation. This conflict makes the responsibilities very uncertain and the change could cause legal disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.88 "Promotion" shall mean (a) those activities customarily undertaken by a Party's field sales representatives in the Territory to encourage the approved use of a particular prescription medical device (or prescription pharmaceutical medicine as applicable) subject to pre-market approval (or other regulatory approval, as applicable), including detailing, and (b) any other activities customarily undertaken by a Party aimed at encouraging the approved use of a particular prescription medical device subject to pre-market authorization approval, including without limitation, healthcare professional peer-to-peer communication, communications of product benefits to IDNs, the creation and use of promotional materials, Marketing, meetings and events (including without limitation speaker bureau events), trade shows, advocacy activities, including with respect to guideline organizations, and sponsorships. The terms "Promote", "Promoting" and "Promotional" shall have corresponding meanings.
perturbation.justification: The original text grants Pfizer the right and obligation to 'Promote and Detail the Product.' The changed text replaces 'Promote' with 'Distribute Product Information to Healthcare providers.' This change contradicts section 1.88, which defines 'Promotion' as encompassing a broad range of activities, including detailing, healthcare professional peer-to-peer communication, creation of promotional materials, marketing, meetings, trade shows and advocacy. By limiting Pfizer's role to distributing product information, the changed text prevents Pfizer from fulfilling the full scope of activities defined as 'Promotion' in 1.88. This creates a direct conflict because Pfizer's obligations are narrowed, making it impossible to meet the comprehensive definition of promotion elsewhere in the agreement.
